CREATE TABLE xml_data (id INT, xml_col XML);
SELECT xpath_string('/root/a', xml_col) FROM xml_data WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, xpath_string('/root/a', xml_col) AS extracted_string FROM xml_data;
SELECT d.id, xpath_string('/root/a', d.xml_col) FROM xml_data d JOIN xml_data d2 ON d.id = d2.id WHERE d.id > 0;
SELECT xpath_string('/root/b', xml_col) AS extracted_string FROM xml_data WHERE xpath_string('/root/a', xml_col) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT d1.id, xpath_string('/root/a', d1.xml_col) AS first_string, xpath_string('/root/b', d2.xml_col) AS second_string FROM xml_data d1 JOIN xml_data d2 ON d1.id <> d2.id;
SELECT xpath_string('/root/a/text()', xml_col) FROM xml_data WHERE xml_col IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*), xpath_string('/root/a', xml_col) FROM xml_data GROUP BY xpath_string('/root/a', xml_col);
WITH extracted AS (SELECT id, xpath_string('/root/a', xml_col) AS result FROM xml_data) SELECT * FROM extracted WHERE result IS NOT NULL;
